languages.text: "Коллекция, собранная под индивида, который перешел мне дорогу в охоте на ценный артефакт — Вольного Торговца Себериана фон Валанциуса. Обладателя неординарного самомнения, которое, тем не менее, дало ему шанс быть навсегда запечатленным в истории. По небольшому размышлению я использовал его для главной роли отдельной экспозиции, демонстрирующей осаду планеты, над которой этот индивид властвовал. Человеческое название оной — Даргонус".

traits.locale_text: "Коллекция, собранная под индивида, который перешел мне дорогу в охоте на ценный артефакт — Вольного Торговца Себериана фон Валанциуса. Примечательный представитель Человечества — неординарное самомнение, которое, тем не менее, дало ему шанс быть навсегда запечатленным в истории. По небольшому размышлению я использовал его для главной роли отдельной экспозиции, демонстрирующей осаду планеты, над которой этот индивид властвовал. Человеческое название оной — Даргонус".

languages.text: "This collection was assembled to receive an individual who dared to challenge me as I was hunting for a certain precious artefact: Rogue Trader Seberian von Valancius. It was his unusual conceit that earned him the chance to be forever preserved in history. After brief consideration, I made him the centrepiece of a dedicated exhibit capturing the siege of a planet over which he once ruled. The human name for this planet is Dargonus."

По небольшому размышлению я использовал его для главной роли отдельной экспозиции, демонстрирующей осаду планеты, над которой этот индивид властвовал. Человеческое название оной — Даргонус".

traits.locale_text: "This collection was assembled to receive an individual who dared to challenge me as I was hunting for a certain precious artefact. Rogue Trader Seberian von Valancius. A noteworthy specimen of Humanity. It was his unusual conceit that earned him the chance to be forever preserved in history. After brief consideration, I made him the centrepiece of a dedicated exhibit capturing the siege of a planet over which he once ruled. The human name for this planet is Dargonus."

"This collection was assembled to receive an individual who dared to challenge me as I was hunting for a certain precious artefact: Rogue Trader Seberian von Valancius. A noteworthy specimen of Humanity. It was his unusual conceit that earned him the chance to be forever preserved in history. After brief consideration, I made him the centrepiece of a dedicated exhibit capturing the siege of a planet over which he once ruled. The human name for this planet is Dargonus."

"Seberian von Valancius — an anomalous primitive who outrageously seized a relic that had captured my interest only scant moments before. Being human, he was ignorant of its true power, and was no match for his pilfered loot. Spurned by his own allies, he drew the attention of others of his kind who did not fear his titles. The siege of Dargonus showed the thief the fragility of his grip on power. It was that pivotal moment, the one which inevitably led him to me, that I have featured in this exhibition."

"This collection was assembled to receive an individual who dared to challenge me as I was hunting for a certain precious artefact. Rogue Trader Seberian von Valancius. A noteworthy specimen of Humanity. It was his unusual conceit that earned him the chance to be forever preserved in history. After brief consideration, I made him the centrepiece of a dedicated exhibit capturing the siege of a planet over which he once ruled. The human name for this planet is Dargonus."

"This collection was assembled to receive an individual who dared to challenge me as I was hunting for a certain precious artefact: Rogue Trader Seberian von Valancius. A noteworthy specimen of Humanity. It was his unusual conceit that earned him the chance to be forever preserved in history. After brief consideration, I made him the centrepiece of a dedicated exhibit capturing the siege of a planet over which he once ruled. The human name for this planet is Dargonus."

languages.text: «Esta colección fue formada para recibir a un individuo que se atrevió a desafiarme durante mi búsqueda de un artefacto valioso: el Comerciante Independiente Seberian von Valancius. Un ejemplar notable de la Humanidad. Fue su singular arrogancia la que le ganó un lugar eterno en la historia. Tras pensarlo brevemente, lo convertí en el centro de una exposición dedicada que captura el asedio de un planeta que en su día gobernó. Los humanos llaman Dargonus a ese mundo».
languages.original_text: "This collection was assembled to receive an individual who dared to challenge me as I was hunting for a certain precious artefact: Rogue Trader Seberian von Valancius. A noteworthy specimen of Humanity. It was his unusual conceit that earned him the chance to be forever preserved in history. After brief consideration, I made him the centrepiece of a dedicated exhibit capturing the siege of a planet over which he once ruled. The human name for this planet is Dargonus."

traits.locale_text: «Esta colección fue formada para recibir a un individuo que se atrevió a desafiarme durante mi búsqueda de un artefacto valioso: el Comerciante Independiente Seberian von Valancius. Un ejemplar notable de la Humanidad. Fue su singular arrogancia la que le ganó un lugar eterno en la historia. Tras pensarlo brevemente, lo convertí en el centro de una exposición dedicada que captura el asedio de un planeta que en su día gobernó. Los humanos llaman Dargonus a ese mundo».

languages.text: “这个收藏，是为了纪念一个胆敢在我追寻某件珍贵造物时挑战我的人：行商浪人塞贝里安·冯·瓦兰修斯。这是一个相当有意思的人类样本。正是他那异于常人的狂妄，为他赢得了被永远载入史册的机会。稍加考虑后，我把他设为一件重要展品的核心，用来再现他曾经统治过的行星遭受围攻的场景。人类将这颗行星称作达戈努斯。”
languages.original_text: "This collection was assembled to receive an individual who dared to challenge me as I was hunting for a certain precious artefact: Rogue Trader Seberian von Valancius. A noteworthy specimen of Humanity. It was his unusual conceit that earned him the chance to be forever preserved in history. After brief consideration, I made him the centrepiece of a dedicated exhibit capturing the siege of a planet over which he once ruled. The human name for this planet is Dargonus."

traits.locale_text: “这个收藏，是为了纪念一个胆敢在我追寻某件珍贵造物时挑战我的人：行商浪人塞贝里安·冯·瓦兰修斯。这是一个相当有意思的人类样本。正是他那异于常人的狂妄，为他赢得了被永远载入史册的机会。稍加考虑后，我把他设为一件重要展品的核心，用来再现他曾经统治过的行星遭受围攻的场景。人类将这颗行星称作达戈努斯。”

languages.text: « Cette collection a été assemblée afin de recevoir un individu qui a osé me défier alors que je remontais la piste d'un artefact précieux : le libre-marchand Seberian von Valancius. Un spécimen remarquable d'être humain. Son arrogance hors norme lui a valu la chance d'entrer dans l'histoire. Après une brève réflexion, j'ai décidé d'en faire la pièce maîtresse d'une exposition dédiée à la capture d'une planète sur laquelle il régnait autrefois. Les humains l'appellent Dargonus. »
languages.original_text: "This collection was assembled to receive an individual who dared to challenge me as I was hunting for a certain precious artefact: Rogue Trader Seberian von Valancius. A noteworthy specimen of Humanity. It was his unusual conceit that earned him the chance to be forever preserved in history. After brief consideration, I made him the centrepiece of a dedicated exhibit capturing the siege of a planet over which he once ruled. The human name for this planet is Dargonus."

traits.locale_text: « Cette collection a été assemblée afin de recevoir un individu qui a osé me défier alors que je remontais la piste d'un artefact précieux : le libre-marchand Seberian von Valancius. Un spécimen remarquable d'être humain. Son arrogance hors norme lui a valu la chance d'entrer dans l'histoire. Après une brève réflexion, j'ai décidé d'en faire la pièce maîtresse d'une exposition dédiée à la capture d'une planète sur laquelle il régnait autrefois. Les humains l'appellent Dargonus. »

languages.text: "Bu koleksiyon, değerli bir eserin peşindeyken bana meydan okumaya cüret eden bir kişiyi ağırlamak için oluşturuldu: Hür Tacir Seberian von Valancius. İnsanlığın dikkate değer bir numunesi. Onu tarihte sonsuza dek korunma şansına kavuşturan şey olağan dışı kibriydi. Kısa bir değerlendirmeden sonra onu, bir zamanlar hükmettiği bir gezegenin kuşatmasını anlatan özel bir serginin merkez parçası yaptım. Bu gezegenin insanların dilindeki adı Dargonus'tur."
languages.original_text: "This collection was assembled to receive an individual who dared to challenge me as I was hunting for a certain precious artefact: Rogue Trader Seberian von Valancius. A noteworthy specimen of Humanity. It was his unusual conceit that earned him the chance to be forever preserved in history. After brief consideration, I made him the centrepiece of a dedicated exhibit capturing the siege of a planet over which he once ruled. The human name for this planet is Dargonus."

İnsanlığın dikkate değer bir numunesi. Onu tarihte sonsuza dek korunma şansına kavuşturan şey olağan dışı kibriydi. Kısa bir değerlendirmeden sonra onu, bir zamanlar hükmettiği bir gezegenin kuşatmasını anlatan özel bir serginin merkez parçası yaptım. Bu gezegenin insanların dilindeki adı Dargonus'tur."

languages.text: 「このコレクションは、ある貴重な遺物を探していた時に私に挑戦した人間のために作られた。彼はローグトレーダーのシベリア・フォン・ヴァランキウス。人類の貴重な標本。彼の変わった考えが、歴史に名を刻む機会を与えた。私は彼を、かつて彼が支配していた惑星の包囲戦を再現した展示のメインに据えた。この惑星の地球名であるダゴナス。」
languages.original_text: "This collection was assembled to receive an individual who dared to challenge me as I was hunting for a certain precious artefact: Rogue Trader Seberian von Valancius. A noteworthy specimen of Humanity. It was his unusual conceit that earned him the chance to be forever preserved in history. After brief consideration, I made him the centrepiece of a dedicated exhibit capturing the siege of a planet over which he once ruled. The human name for this planet is Dargonus."

traits.locale_text: 「このコレクションは、ある貴重な遺物を探していた時に私に挑戦した人間のために作られた。彼はローグトレーダーのシベリア・フォン・ヴァランキウス。人類の貴重な標本。彼の変わった考えが、歴史に名を刻む機会を与えた。私は彼を、かつて彼が支配していた惑星の包囲戦を再現した展示のメインに据えた。この惑星の地球名であるダゴナス。」

languages.text: "Diese Sammlung wurde zusammengetragen, um in den Besitz einer Person zu gelangen, die es wagte, mich auf meiner Suche nach einem kostbaren Artefakt herauszufordern: Freihändler Seberian von Valancius. Ein bemerkenswerter Vertreter der Menschheit. Seine ungewöhnliche Arroganz bescherte ihm die Chance, in die Geschichte einzugehen. Ich machte ihn nach kurzer Überlegung zum Herzstück eines Exponats, das die Belagerung eines Planeten darstellt, über den er einst herrschte. Die Menschen nennen diesen Planeten Dargonus."
languages.original_text: "This collection was assembled to receive an individual who dared to challenge me as I was hunting for a certain precious artefact: Rogue Trader Seberian von Valancius.
